ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the ticker */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "primary_exchange" TEXT /* Primary stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector_information ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector_information ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security (ticker) the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the security traded on the given date */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted high price */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted low price */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "adj_volume" INTEGER /* Adjusted volume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES securities ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security (ticker) the user accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES securities ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_information" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security (ticker) the company is associated with */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_information_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES securities ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticker_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker relationship */,
  "parent_ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent ticker */,
  "child_ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child ticker */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., split, merger) */,
  "ration" REAL /* Ratio of the split or merger */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticker_relationships_parent_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_ticker_id") REFERENCES securities ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticker_relationships_child_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_ticker_id") REFERENCES securities ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_information" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the sector belongs to */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_information_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sector_information ("sector_id")
)
